title: 货代仓库、提货和截仓时间
theme: 从 pickup / warehouse address / cut-off time 开始
goals: 能协调客户货代到工厂提货或把货送到指定仓库
能确认仓库地址、联系人、预约时间、装货时间和截仓时间
能处理货代临时改时间、仓库拒收或需要交接凭证的场景

review.title: Day 24 复习
items: 昨天练了 beneficiary account、wrong payment、refund request、deduction 和 transfer mistake。
今天进入物流执行阶段：付款、单据和出货确认后，货物要交给客户货代或送到指定仓库。
物流协调要确认具体人、具体地址、具体时间和交接凭证，不能只说 send to warehouse。

preview.scenario: 客户的货代联系工厂提货，或客户要求把货送到指定仓库。你需要确认 pickup 时间、warehouse address、cut-off time、装货时间和仓库收货凭证。
needToKnow: pickup 是货代提货，factory pickup 是到工厂提货。
cut-off time 是截仓时间，错过可能导致船期或航班延后。
warehouse receipt 是仓库收货凭证，能证明货物已经交接。

vocabulary.usage: 用于货代或快递到工厂、仓库取货。
vocabulary.example: Please ask your forwarder to arrange pickup tomorrow.

vocabulary.meaning: 截仓时间 / 截止入仓时间
vocabulary.usage: 用于货物必须送达仓库或码头的最后时间。
vocabulary.example: Please confirm the cut-off time with your forwarder.

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户要求把货送到货代仓库或指定仓库。
vocabulary.example: Please send us the warehouse address and contact person.

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户货代直接到工厂装货。
vocabulary.example: We can support factory pickup after shipment release.

vocabulary.usage: 用于货物送仓或交接时随货提供的单据。
vocabulary.example: We will prepare the delivery note for the warehouse.

vocabulary.usage: 用于确认工厂装车、装柜或货代提货的时间。
vocabulary.example: Please confirm the loading time with your driver.

vocabulary.usage: 用于货物从工厂交给货代、仓库或司机。
vocabulary.example: We will take photos during the handover.

vocabulary.usage: 用于证明仓库已收到货物。
vocabulary.example: Please ask the warehouse to provide a warehouse receipt after delivery.

sentences.label: 安排货代提货
sentences.basic: Your forwarder can pick up goods.
sentences.natural: Please ask your forwarder to arrange pickup tomorrow.
sentences.business: Please ask your forwarder to contact us and arrange factory pickup after shipment release.

sentences.label: 确认仓库地址
sentences.natural: Please send us the warehouse address and contact person.
sentences.business: Please send us the warehouse address, contact person, phone number, and receiving time so we can arrange delivery.

sentences.label: 确认截仓时间
sentences.natural: Please confirm the cut-off time with your forwarder.
sentences.business: Please confirm the warehouse cut-off time with your forwarder so we can arrange delivery without missing the schedule.

sentences.label: 确认装货时间
sentences.natural: Please confirm the loading time with your driver.
sentences.business: Please confirm the loading time, truck plate number, and driver contact before factory pickup.

sentences.label: 索要收货凭证
sentences.natural: Please ask the warehouse to provide a warehouse receipt after delivery.
sentences.business: After the goods are delivered, please ask the warehouse to provide a warehouse receipt for our shipment record.

chatAnalysis.problem: 表达不专业，也没有说明货代需要联系谁、什么时候提货。
chatAnalysis.better: Please ask your forwarder to arrange pickup tomorrow.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Please ask your forwarder to contact us and arrange factory pickup after shipment release.

chatAnalysis.problem: 只要地址不够，实际送仓还需要联系人、电话和收货时间。
chatAnalysis.better: Please send us the warehouse address and contact person.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Please send us the warehouse address, contact person, phone number, and receiving time so we can arrange delivery.

chatAnalysis.problem: closing 不够具体，物流里应确认 cut-off time，避免误解。
chatAnalysis.better: Please confirm the cut-off time with your forwarder.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Please confirm the warehouse cut-off time with your forwarder so we can arrange delivery without missing the schedule.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：货代到工厂提货

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Our forwarder will pick up the goods tomorrow.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Okay. Please ask your forwarder to contact us and confirm the pickup time.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: They will contact you today.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Great. We will prepare the goods and delivery note for factory pickup.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：送到指定仓库

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please send the goods to our forwarder's warehouse.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Please send us the warehouse address, contact person, phone number, and receiving time.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: I will send the warehouse details now.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. We will arrange delivery after confirming the cut-off time.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：赶截仓时间

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The warehouse cut-off time is 4 PM today. Can you deliver before that?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I will check the loading time and driver availability immediately.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please do not miss the cut-off time.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. I will coordinate with our warehouse and keep you posted on the delivery status.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：协调货代提货、送仓和截仓时间

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Our forwarder will arrange pickup for this shipment.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Okay. Please ask your forwarder to contact us and confirm the factory pickup time.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Do they need an appointment?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, please ask them to confirm the loading time with us in advance.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What information do you need from the driver?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We need the truck plate number, driver contact, and estimated arrival time.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If the driver cannot come tomorrow, can you deliver to their warehouse?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, we can arrange delivery if you provide the warehouse address and receiving time.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The warehouse has a cut-off time.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please confirm the warehouse cut-off time with your forwarder so we can avoid missing the schedule.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The cut-off time is 4 PM on Friday.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. I will check the loading time and arrange delivery before the cut-off time if possible.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please prepare the delivery note.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. We will prepare the delivery note and attach it with the goods.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you take photos when handing over the goods?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, we will take photos during the handover for your shipment record.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What if the warehouse refuses to receive the goods?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: If the warehouse refuses the goods, we will contact you immediately and ask for the reason.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please ask them to provide a receipt after they receive the goods.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, we will ask the warehouse to provide a warehouse receipt after delivery.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please update me once the goods arrive at the warehouse.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will keep you posted and send the warehouse receipt once we receive it.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If the driver arrives late, please inform us immediately.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. We will monitor the pickup schedule and update you if anything changes.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Thank you. This shipment is urgent.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. We will coordinate closely with your forwarder and try to complete the handover before the cut-off time.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：请让您的货代联系我们并安排工厂提货。
exercises.answer: Please ask your forwarder to contact us and arrange factory pickup.
acceptable: please ask your forwarder to contact us and arrange factory pickup
please ask your forwarder to contact us and arrange pickup at our factory

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更专业：send warehouse address
exercises.answer: Please send us the warehouse address, contact person, phone number, and receiving time.
acceptable: please send us the warehouse address contact person phone number and receiving time
please send us the warehouse address contact person phone number and receiving schedule
exercises.hint: 送仓不只需要地址，还要联系人和收货时间。

exercises.prompt: 填空：Please confirm the warehouse cut-off ____ with your forwarder.
客户说货代明天提货，哪个回复更合适？
options: Please ask your forwarder to contact us and confirm the pickup time.
exercises.answer: Please ask your forwarder to contact us and confirm the pickup time.
acceptable: please ask your forwarder to contact us and confirm the pickup time

exercises.prompt: 中译英：货物送达后，请让仓库提供收货凭证。
exercises.answer: After the goods are delivered, please ask the warehouse to provide a warehouse receipt.
acceptable: after the goods are delivered please ask the warehouse to provide a warehouse receipt
after delivery please ask the warehouse to provide a warehouse receipt
exercises.hint: warehouse receipt 是仓库收货凭证。

exercises.prompt: 客户说：The warehouse cut-off time is 4 PM today. Can you deliver before that? 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: I will check the loading time and driver availability immediately, then update you as soon as possible.
acceptable: i will check the loading time and driver availability immediately then update you as soon as possible
i will check the loading time and driver availability immediately and update you as soon as possible
exercises.hint: 不要直接保证，先确认 loading time 和司机情况。

homework: 把 pickup、cut-off time、warehouse address、factory pickup、delivery note、loading time、handover、warehouse receipt 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍，重点练 warehouse address 和 cut-off time。
写一段 WhatsApp 回复：客户货代要明天提货，你要确认提货时间、司机信息、装货时间，并说明会准备 delivery note 和 handover photos。
tomorrow: Day 26 会练物流延误、清关问题和跟踪更新。
